family_summary: Urban operations centered on Fallujah, al-Anbar Governorate, in 2004, involving U.S.-led Coalition forces, Iraqi government forces, and insurgent organizations. This bundle estimates direct-death discrimination ratios separately for the April siege and the November-December return offensive rather than forcing a single citywide 2004 average.
notes: Episode-first bundle. Fully estimated episodes are the first and second battle windows; the interbattle sanctuary/shaping phase is listed for periodization but not fully quantified. Direct violent deaths only are used for core DR.
